endpointAliases._note: Filesystem-backed registries (Firebase Hosting, S3+CDN, etc.) serve packMetadata at the file path because dot-containing path segments don't reliably trigger CDN URL rewrites. Clients SHOULD consult `endpoints` rather than hardcoding paths. Dynamic registries MAY accept `/v1/packs/{name}` and alias to `/v1/packs/{name}/index.json`.

signingKeys._note: Pre-existing root key. Signed the v1.0 reference packs published during the registry MVP. Reserved for openwop-project-owned namespaces. Held offline (sealed envelope / hardware token).
Day-to-day publisher key for the openwop team. Same authority scope as openwop-registry-root but used online; root stays sealed for emergency rotation.

First external vendor namespace under packs.openwop.dev. Per spec/v1/registry-operations.md §Step 1 vendor-namespace rule, vendor.myndhyve.* publishes MUST verify against this key; submissions from any other key MUST be refused at PR review.

Per-tier publisher key for the community.openwop-team.demo educational pack. Distinct from openwop-registry-root + openwop-team-1 so the demo demonstrates the spec's per-publisher signing identity pattern. Pinned to the single demo namespace; cannot sign for core.* or vendor.*.
